Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: Bob paints a valley and mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley of Tranquility

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain amid foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mystic Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a chilly forest scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Elegance

Video.summary: Bob turns a mistake into a success.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Happy Accident

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Bob paints a rain-drenched forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: After the Rain

Video.summary: Bob creates a mountain hideaway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Reflection

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry night scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening's Peace

Video.summary: A scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Lake

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint forest cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: New Day's Dawn

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a deep-woods scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tranquil Wooded Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints purple skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Aglow

Video.summary: Bob paints a mirror image.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snow Birch

Video.summary: Bob paints a winding meadow stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Storm's A Comin'

Video.summary: Bob paints a gurgling brook on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Brook

Video.summary: Bob paints a fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Angler's Haven

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: An Arctic Winter Day

Video.summary: Sunshine on a waterside landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twilight Beauty

Video.summary: Bob paints a river scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Early Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a wintry night.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Evening at the Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints a picturesque barn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Roadside Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints an East Coast mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Mountain

Video.summary: Bob creates a glowing effect on a lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow

Video.summary: Bob paints a monochromatic scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Knoll

Video.summary: Bob paints autumn colors.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bright Autumn Trees

Video.summary: Bob paints a seaside sunset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Over the Waves

Video.summary: Waves crash against a moonlit shore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black Seascape

Video.summary: Bob paints a difficult seascape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain by the Sea

Video.summary: Glowing red peaks loom over a lazy stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Nature's Paradise

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Steep Mountains

Video.summary: Bob uses black and white base coats.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Hideaway

Video.summary: Cottony clouds envelop green hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Charm

Video.summary: A wondrous plush green forest where an almost invisible mountain overlooks a falling stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Waterfall

Video.summary: A bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lazy River

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pastel Winter
